prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS9 (6.2L Supercharged V8, 638 HP)** from a CTS-V Gen 2, retaining the 4L85E transmission with a **Sonnax Smart-Tech valve body** and **Precision Industries 3600-stall torque converter** for optimized launch control. Pair with a **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU and **FAST XFI Sportsman** ignition system for precise fuel and spark mapping.

Forced induction upgrade using a **ProCharger F-3R-112 (112mm) centrifugal supercharger** with a **Vortech air-to-water intercooler** and **ID1000x injectors** to support 850+ HP on E85. Custom **Kooks 2.5" long-tube headers** and a **Bosal 3" cat-back exhaust** with **Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers** for aggressive tone without drone.

Suspension overhaul with **Detroit Speed QUADRALINK 4-link rear setup** and **RideTech HQ Series coilovers** (adjustable damping) for improved handling. Front **Moog Problem Solver ball joints** and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** to eliminate slop. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Hawk DTC-70 brake pads** for fade resistance.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (custom-fitted for Fleetwood’s 121.5" wheelbase) with **Fiberglass fenders** and **carbon fiber side skirts** to accommodate 10.5" and 12" wide wheels. **VMR V710 19x10.5" (ET25) and 19x12" (ET45) wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/35/19 and 315/30/19)** for staggered grip.

Custom **PPG Cadillac Matador Red paint** with **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap** and **Oracle Lighting RGB LED halo headlights** (DRL mode only). **Seibon carbon fiber hood** with **functional NACA ducts** for LS9 intercooler cooling. **Aeromotive fuel cell** relocated to the trunk with a **custom aluminum firewall** for safety.

**Recaro SPG XL seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather** with **Alcantara suede inserts**) and a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (14" suede) on a **Momo Mod.73 hub adapter**. **Custom rear bench delete** with a **Vorshlag Motorsports roll cage** (bolt-in, 8-point) and **Sparco 6-point harnesses** for track use.
